things.name: Rijksmuseum Twenthe
things.description: Outstanding regional art museum with Dutch Old Masters and a comprehensive collection from medieval times to contemporary art

things.name: Grolsch Veste
things.description: Modern 30,205-capacity stadium of FC Twente, one of the Netherlands' top clubs, set in the Enschede eastern suburbs

things.name: Enschede City Centre
things.description: Rebuilt city centre after the 1862 fire and 2000 fireworks disaster, with lively squares, independent shops and terrace cafes

things.name: Natura Docet Wonderryck Twente
things.description: Remarkable nature and cultural museum in the Twente countryside with natural history dioramas and landscape heritage displays

things.name: Twentse Schouwburg
things.description: Enschede's modern theatre and concert hall complex presenting drama, opera and music in a striking contemporary setting

things.name: Museum Jannink
things.description: Industrial heritage museum in a restored textile factory telling the story of the Twente cotton-weaving industry that made the city

things.name: Hengelo City
things.description: Neighbouring industrial city just 10km from Enschede with the impressive OAD Theatre and the Hengelo market hall

things.name: Haaksbergen Countryside
things.description: Typical Twente rural landscape of farmsteads, hedgerows and mill ponds south of Enschede, best explored by bicycle

things.name: Boekelo Thermal Baths
things.description: Historic spa resort at Boekelo with natural salt springs and wellness facilities, just 6km from Enschede centre

things.name: Enschede Outdoor Market
things.description: Large Saturday market on the Grote Markt and surrounding streets with hundreds of stalls selling fresh produce and goods
